decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing Songs of the Damned and Reaping the Graves to generate a large amount of mana and reanimate creatures from the graveyard. By cycling through cards with Drannith Healer and Stinger, the combo pieces can be assembled quickly. The deck also includes efficient creatures like Imposing Vantasaur and Horror of the Broken Lands to apply pressure on the opponent. With a mix of mana accelerants and reanimation spells, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence and combo finish.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent through direct burn spells and aggressive creatures. By utilizing efficient low-cost spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, as well as cards like Highway Robbery and Sneaky Snacker to gain advantages, the deck aims to aggressively reduce the opponent's life total. The inclusion of cards like Guttersnipe and Voldaren Epicure further enhances the deck's ability to deal incremental damage, while Fireblast and Kessig Flamebreather provide powerful finishers to close out games.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using a combination of cheap burn spells and aggressive creatures. By utilizing cards like Grab the Prize, Sneaky Snacker, and Highway Robbery, along with efficient creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Kessig Flamebreather, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. Lava Dart, Lightning Bolt, Fireblast, and Fiery Temper provide additional reach and removal, while Guttersnipe and Faithless Looting help generate card advantage and enable more aggressive plays.

This mono black aggro deck focuses on utilizing sacrifice effects and creature buffs to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The deck includes various low-cost creatures like Carrion Feeder and Bloodthrone Vampire that can be sacrificed to trigger effects like Mortician Beetle's power boost. Cards like Rite of Consumption and Village Rites provide additional value from sacrificing creatures, while Supernatural Stamina helps protect key creatures. The deck aims to outpace and outvalue the opponent by sacrificing creatures and utilizing their death triggers to maintain board presence and pressure.

This Golgari/Jund Garden control deck focuses on removal spells to control the board while generating value through sacrificing creatures and recurring them from the graveyard. It aims to disrupt opponent's strategies by removing threats and graveyard recursion, while also featuring some token generation and card draw engines to stay ahead in card advantage. The deck utilizes a mixture of removal spells, sacrifice outlets, and creature recursion to outvalue opponents and grind out wins in the long game.

The deck focuses on utilizing recurring token creatures from Khalni Garden and the ability of Pestilence to clear opponents' creatures. It also includes several ways to gain life, such as Cauldron Familiar and Lembas, to offset the damage from Pestilence. The inclusion of Golgari Rot Farm and Heritage Reclamation allows for constant value through recurring lands. The deck also includes removal spells like Cast Down and Tragic Slip to control the board. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents through a combination of token generation, life gain, and removal.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively control the board with low-cost creatures and removal spells in order to disrupt opponents' game plan and deal damage efficiently. By combining aggressive creatures like Refurbished Familiar and Writhing Chrysalis with powerful removal spells like Galvanic Blast and Cast Down, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with tempo advantage. Additionally, the inclusion of card draw with Ichor Wellspring and Cleansing Wildfire helps to maintain hand advantage and consistency in dealing with threats.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The key strategy is to flood the board with cheap creatures like Burning-Tree Emissary and Goblin Bushwhacker, while also using efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast. The deck also includes cards like Chain Lightning and Rally at the Hornburg for additional reach and damage output. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault, ending the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. The deck includes cards that provide extra damage, protection for key creatures, and mana ramp to cast powerful spells early. By utilizing a mix of fast creatures like Seeker of Skybreak and Sneaky Snacker, along with removal spells like Skred and Malevolent Rumble, this deck aims to quickly dominate the battlefield and deal damage to the opponent before they have a chance to establish their own game plan.

This Aggro Jund deck focuses on using artifacts and sacrificing creatures to generate value and control the board. The deck contains removal spells like Cast Down and Terminate, alongside creature buffs like Eviscerator's Insight and Nyxborn Hydra. Cards like Cleansing Wildfire and Twisted Landscape help fix mana while Drossforge Bridge and Slagwoods Bridge provide additional utility. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, taking advantage of sacrificing artifacts and creatures for benefit.

The main concept of this Pauper 1 vs 1 Aggro Jund deck is to utilize artifact creatures and sacrifice mechanics to control the board and continuously generate value. By sacrificing artifacts like Ichor Wellspring and Nihil Spellbomb, the player can draw cards and disrupt their opponent's strategy. Additionally, cards like Writhing Chrysalis and Fanatical Offering can provide additional creatures to apply pressure on the opponent. The inclusion of removal spells like Cast Down and Terminate helps to deal with threats on the opposing side while maintaining a strong board presence.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence through aggressive creatures and disruption spells, while also utilizing artifact sacrifice synergy to gain card advantage and deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Cleansing Wildfire and Cast Down, while also utilizing cards like Drossforge Bridge and Fanatical Offering to generate token creatures or sacrifice artifacts for additional benefits. The inclusion of cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Krark-Clan Shaman adds graveyard hate and extra disruption against certain strategies.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with cheap and aggressive creatures, backed up by burn spells for direct damage. With a low mana curve and efficient creatures like Burning-Tree Emissary and Goblin Bushwhacker, it aims to take control of the game early and finish off the opponent before they can stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt adds additional reach and removal, while cards like Rally at the Hornburg provide a way to rebuild the board if needed.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to quickly ramp up mana with cards like Arbor Elf, Utopia Sprawl, and Wild Growth, allowing you to cast big threats like Avenging Hunter and Boarding Party early in the game. Cards like Thermokarst, Mwonvuli Acid-Moss, and Structural Distortion disrupt your opponent's mana base, while Eldrazi Repurposer and Annoyed Altisaur provide additional threats. Malevolent Rumble and Generous Ent help you finish off your opponent quickly, while Writhing Chrysalis and Bonder's Ornament provide card advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with fast, powerful creatures and disruption spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing Gates to control the game by using removal spells and combat tricks. It includes a mix of creatures with evasion, protection, and lifegain to stabilize the board. The deck aims to outvalue opponents by leveraging the flexibility of Gates to ensure that the player maintains control of the battlefield. The inclusion of mana fixing and draw spells helps to ensure consistent performance in the Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using Gates to fix mana and utilizing powerful removal spells and defensive creatures to stay ahead. By combining efficient removal spells like Journey to Nowhere with defensive creatures like Sacred Cat and Seeker of Skybreak, this deck aims to outlast opponents and win through attrition. The Gates help ensure consistent mana production while also providing additional defensive options. Malevolent Rumble and Prismatic Strands provide additional protection against aggressive strategies, allowing the deck to slow down the opponent's game plan and ultimately come out on top.
